page_metadata.biotools__summary: GlycoEP is a new webserver for more accurate prediction of N-linked, O-linked and C-linked glycosites in eukaryotic glycoproteins using two larger datasets, namely, standard and advanced datasets.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: GlycoEP is a new webserver for more accurate prediction of N-linked, O-linked and C-linked glycosites in eukaryotic glycoproteins using two larger datasets, namely, standard and advanced datasets.
